text.div: No narrative is provided for definitional resources. A human-readable rendering can be found in the implementation guide(s) where this resource is used.

name: ExtReportFirstAuthorizationDate
title: ext Report.FirstAuthorizationDate
description: An extension to provide the date of first authorization.
purpose: This extension represents the FirstAuthorizationDate concept of the Report building block for patient use cases in the context of the information standard Pathology (Pathologie).

element.definition: An extension to provide the date of first authorization.
Date of first authorization. Not to be overwritten when authorized again.
element.comment: In case a report has been authorized only once, the AuthorizationDate and FirstAuthorizationDate concepts coincide, and this extension is optional. If a report is authorized more than once, the FirstAuthorizationDate is conveyed here, while the AuthorizationDate is conveyed via `.effectivePeriod.end`.
